tool_args.label: 125th Street Transportation Improvements - Public Workshop December 3, 2012

warnings: source.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher has 39 accepted/canonical observations and should link to entity context when useful. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: New York City Department of Transportation

payload.entity_name: New York City Department of Transportation

payload.description: Based on public workshop feedback, NYCT and DOT are proposing SBS for 125th Street. Upgrade M60 route to SBS. Potential improvements include limited stops, off-board fare collection, offset bus lanes, updated curb regulations, and transit signal priority.

warnings: project.routes_served is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Route lists should become project-route relations when supported. Suggested relation: serves_route.

payload.description: 125th Street corridor in Manhattan, New York City. Bus routes Bx15, M60, M100, M101 operate on this corridor. Over 30,000 bus passengers daily.
Bus route on 125th Street. Busiest route for crosstown travel. Proposed for upgrade to SBS. Serves LaGuardia Airport.
Bus route on 125th Street.
Bus route on 125th Street.
Bus route on 125th Street.
Proposed limited-stop bus service on 125th Street. M100, M101, Bx15 and M60 SBS would serve a subset of stops.
Proposed off-board fare payment and all-door boarding for 125th Street SBS.
Proposed offset bus lanes on 125th Street to benefit all buses on corridor while maintaining needed parking.
Proposed Transit Signal Priority (TSP) to reduce time stopped at red lights on 125th Street.
Proposed updated curb regulations to reduce double parking and make deliveries easier on 125th Street.
Proposed pedestrian safety improvements on 125th Street.
Improved passenger information including bus time real-time tracking on 125th Street.
Second public workshop on 125th Street transportation improvements. Reviewed issues from Workshop #1, presented proposed SBS improvements, merchant survey results, and parking analysis.

payload.event_name: 125th Street Transportation Improvements September Public Workshop
payload.description: First public workshop on 125th Street transportation improvements with over 90 attendees. Sponsored by all Harlem area elected officials and Community Boards.
Next public meeting for 125th Street Transportation Improvements corridor design with public input.
